dialogues.text: All right, let's get into this. Tron is a fight for freedom and recognition in our world and the new digital frontier. Kevin Flynn is a self centered programmer and video game developer seeking proof that the popular arcade games launched by the head of N comm Ed villager were actually created by him. Caught hacking villagers new master control program, Flynn finds himself transported into the digital world of computers, where he is forced to play his own video games, his life hanging in the balance if he loses. Gathering program allies, Flynn will race to liberate the digital system from the clutches of the MCP, and tried to stop its tendrils from seizing control of the real world as well. To do that, he will need all of his video games skills to care about others as much as himself and the help of the one security program capable of restoring freedom to the system. Tron
